summary: A fresh EDGAR filing re-check (UUUU/WRAP/NTSK) confirms NO new July offering on any held name, so the book's biggest risk stays the standing dilution/distribution overhang on the three elevated holdings -- UUUU (undrawn $300M ATM + escalating Chalmers Form 144 selling, now ~$13.05 down ~25% on the month), NTSK (live post-lockup Lightspeed distribution overhang), and WRAP (badly desynced price cache, broker_disagrees 38.9%, phantom-sell path gated by fix a5484b6).

WRAP.note: Graded up on DATA QUALITY: nightly audit shows source_mismatch + stale_cache (last 7/8) + broker_disagrees 38.9% (cache 1.555 vs broker 2.16); phantom-sell path gated by fix a5484b6 so the stale cache no longer drives the stop. Fresh EDGAR check: NO 424B5/S-3/ATM draw. 7/13 8-K is a $2M Frenel securities-purchase (minor PIPE-style issuance + US/NATO exclusive rights) -- business-positive; $200M baby-shelf is CAPACITY only; recent insider activity is CEO/director BUYING (100k director buy 7/9). Lorentzian -0.5, FinBERT +0.019. Position +$6.60 at $2.30.

UUUU.note: Fresh EDGAR check confirms $300M Controlled Equity ATM (#333-278193, 6/13) still UNDRAWN -- no July 424B5/prospectus draw. Insider picture net-NEGATIVE by size: Chalmers Form 144 selling (200k 6/29 + 300k 7/9 via RBC) outweighs the 7/9 CEO 74k/$968k + Hansen 4k buys. 7/13 8-K is operational uranium/rare-earth expansion (constructive, not a raise). Now ~$13.05, down ~25% on the month on sector weakness + VAC-acquisition uncertainty, no fresh raise. Lorentzian -0.75, FinBERT 0.0. Not in nightly audit.

NTSK.note: Book's best gainer ~$14.62 (+$7.52); RAISED on data quality (audit broker_disagrees 14.2%, cache 12.61 vs broker 14.4) -- stops gated by the live feed (fix a5484b6). Fresh EDGAR check: NO S-1/S-3/424B5/secondary, no new Form 144 in the 7/9-15 window. Live post-lockup distribution overhang persists (Lightspeed fund sales 7/9 + 7/8 Form 144 1.75M Class A), partly offset by ICONIQ buying (610k 7/10 + 306k 7/14) + director buys. Hiring pulse 148 vs 150 (flat, no posting-pull). FinBERT +0.158.

CAI.note: Clean: NO shelf/ATM (confirmed prior same-week sweep), director $990k buy 7/13, Caris Detect launch, $100M buyback; Goldman Buy $27 / Evercore Buy $25 above ~$17.21. FinBERT +0.144. Not in nightly audit; broker reconciles on shares (match). Position -$0.08 (immaterial).

YEXT.note: NO shelf/ATM; failed Feb take-private replaced by anti-dilutive $140M self-tender; director Englander bought 76,190 sh @ $5.22 (7/13). Nightly audit shows only a minor broker_disagrees 3.9% (cache 5.22 vs broker 5.43) -- immaterial and cache sits above the $4.94 stop, so kept low with the desync noted. Hiring pulse 25 vs 24 (flat). FinBERT 0.0. Position +$1.24 at $5.59.

flags.why: Distressed reverse-merger: definitive Serapha Bio merger + $230M concurrent private placement leaves pre-merger holders only ~3.7% of the combined entity; oncology pipeline halted, ~75% workforce cut, hiring pulse now 0 open roles corroborating the wind-down. On scan and daily-research avoid list.

Most recent 10-Q discloses going-concern doubt including possible Chapter 7 liquidation; just closed a $23.7M private placement (warrant overhang). FinBERT -0.288 on the cash-runway story. Keep hard-vetoed if it resurfaces.
Nasdaq delisting determination after an SEC trading halt tied to social-media pump-and-dump manipulation; suspension effective 7/16 absent appeal. Hard veto.

Top-3 scan candidate (~$1.70) that diluted ~30%: $50M underwritten registered direct (27,624,310 sh at $1.81) + $9.2M Lilly PIPE closed 6/26, plus a 7/6 F-3 registering 3,030,303 PIPE sh for resale. Stock sits BELOW the $1.81 offer; CEO's 7/8 & 7/13 buys came AFTER the raise. Intel concurs (flags_for_bot); no new July offering.

Top-3 scan candidate (~$3.49) with a textbook pump-and-dump signature: HK microcap ran ~$0.23 (6/12) to >$10 (6/16) then collapsed to ~$3.49, no fundamental driver. Reject on the pump veto; nightly audit also flags cache stale (last 7/8). Intel concurs (flags_for_bot).

Nightly audit shows a reverse-split cache desync (cache 0.386 vs yahoo 6.04). FinBERT +0.919 is a misattributed generic-market headline. Keep vetoed.

Scan name (~$9.74) with real recent dilution: $300M underwritten offering (23,871,526 sh at $11.52 + 2,170,138 pre-funded warrants) closed ~5/11. Stock sits BELOW the $11.52 offer; the +4.0 insider score is offering-backer/healthcare-fund accumulation, NOT management conviction. Do not buy as a fresh insider breakout. Intel concurs (flags_for_bot).

Scan candidate on the avoid list with a severe dilution overhang: ~167M sh out, active $300M S-3 shelf (7/8), 13.95M warrants, authorized shares hiked to 450M. Phase 2 news constructive but capital structure unresolved.
Scan candidate on the avoid list: automatic S-3ASR shelf effective 2026-01-13, already used twice via 424B5, plus an active $50M ATM -- ongoing drip-dilution setup.

Pending ~$5.8B all-stock acquisition of Valaris (15.235 RIG sh per Valaris sh) dilutes existing holders to ~53% of the combined company and carries a DOJ 'second request' -- parties won't certify before 7/31, earliest close ~9/29. Material dilution + binary-vote risk; moved OFF the watchlist to avoid.

On the avoid list; priced a $100M underwritten offering (13,495,277 sh at $7.41) on 6/24 -- real dilution alongside the ABS-201 Phase 1 catalyst. FinBERT -0.027 (worst -0.941 on a -9% day). Keep flagged so it is not bought as a fresh breakout.
On the desk avoid list, not held: live $100M ATM (since 2024) plus a Feb-2026 $107.6M underwritten offering (20M sh at $5.00), now underwater near $3.7 -- ongoing drip-dilution.

On the avoid list, not held: down ~91% YoY near 52-wk lows despite a token insider buy, 10-for-1 reverse split tied to Nasdaq compliance, pivoting into Dogecoin mining hardware -- distress signal, not a turnaround.

No longer held and off the scan; retained as a do-not-REBUY: serial diluter (~855M sh) with active pump activity (Mandela Dollar stablecoin 7/10, Dream Bowl meme-coin 7/6). FinBERT +0.455 on GPU-fleet pump headlines. Broker_state reconciles clean today.

dilution_watch.note: $300M Controlled Equity Offering (#333-278193) usable now; fresh EDGAR check shows NO July draw. Chalmers Form 144 selling escalating: 200k sh 6/29 + 300k sh 7/9 via RBC, outweighs the 7/9 CEO 74k buy.

$50M underwritten registered direct (27,624,310 sh at $1.81) + $9.2M Lilly private placement; closed 6/26. 7/6 F-3 registers 3,030,303 PIPE sh for resale. No NEW July offering.

disagreements: UUUU: intel frames the CEO/Hansen insider BUYS prominently ('no boost'); the Chalmers Form 144 SALE stack (200k 6/29 + 300k 7/9 via RBC, ~$10M+) outweighs the ~$1M of buying by size, so the insider signal behind the score is net-NEGATIVE -- reinforced by the ~25% one-month drawdown to ~$13.05.

NTSK: intel narrates the ICONIQ/director BUYS as the story; the offsetting Lightspeed VC sales (7/9) plus the 7/8 Form 144 (1.75M Class A) are a live post-lockup distribution overhang -- the net float pressure is why this stays elevated despite the +$7.52 gain.

WRAP: intel's alerts omit that the price cache is badly desynced from the broker of record (cache 1.555 last 7/8 vs broker 2.16, 38.9%); the position and stop read correctly only because dashboard/exit-radar use the live feed and the phantom-sell path is gated by fix a5484b6 -- a data-quality risk intel does not surface.

Overtrading (carried): radar shows the weekly buy budget over the 4-buy weekly cap -- the budget check is currently BLOCKING new buys, but the pace is a standing discipline flag independent of any single ticker.
